# editabilityChanged()

**Instance Method**

Tells the system that the document’s editability status has changed.

## Declaration

```swift
func editabilityChanged()
```

## Discussion

In response, the system refreshes the text interaction gestures, depending on the value of `isEditable`

## UI updates

- **refreshKeyboardUI()**: Tells the system to refresh the keyboard UI.

items.description: Tells the system to refresh the keyboard UI.
